all.critique:
Below is a plain‐English summary of the issues found when comparing the analysis against the rubric:

1. Data Loader Source Ambiguity (Low Severity)
 • The analysis instructs that you “use the test (or validation) data loader” from the data dictionary. However, it doesn’t clarify what to do if both keys (e.g., “test” and “val”) exist or how the proper data source is chosen. Although this ambiguity is minor and unlikely to break reproduction, it might lead to slight confusion in implementation.
